title: tanacetum minimum
intro: Tanacetum minimum, also known as pyrethrum, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to repel insects and exhibit anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antipyretic effects. The plant's extracts have been shown to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and soothing digestive issues, as well as possessing antimicrobial and antioxidant properties. Tanacetum minimum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
